name: Design Step
label: Design Step
description: Step Building Pipeline — Stage 0: Design. Two modes: (1) designStep: takes a natural language description and generates a step.json spec with logic plan using Claude. (2) buildAsyncUI: takes a flowId + templateId + UI playbook and builds or improves an async module UI on an existing step. Inputs vary by action. Returns: spec/logicPlan or async UI build result.

inputs.label: Action
inputs.helpText: Choose what to do: design a new step from a description, or build/improve an async UI on an existing deployed step. Default reads from POST body.action; falls back to 'designStep' when absent.

inputs.label: Step description
inputs.helpText: Natural language description of what the step should do. Be specific about inputs, outputs, APIs, and behavior.

inputs.label: Service category
inputs.helpText: Service category (e.g. 'RSS', 'API', 'Data', 'Files'). Helps the LLM choose appropriate modules and patterns.

inputs.label: Additional context
inputs.helpText: Extra context: API docs, example payloads, constraints, or references to existing steps.

inputs.label: Flow ID
inputs.helpText: UUID of the Edison flow containing the step to build a UI for.

inputs.label: Template ID
inputs.helpText: UUID of the step template within the flow. The async module will be wired into this template.

inputs.label: UI Playbook
inputs.helpText: Describe the UI you want: field grouping, sections, conditional visibility, help text strategy, tooltips, modal patterns. The LLM uses this as its design brief.

inputs.label: Activate flow after save
inputs.helpText: When enabled, the flow is automatically activated after saving the updated UI.

inputs.label: LLM Model
inputs.helpText: Anthropic model ID. Sonnet for async UI building, Opus for step design.

inputs.label: Anthropic API Key (plain-text override)
inputs.helpText: Optional plain-text Anthropic API key. When provided, takes priority over the auth-external-component. Used by the pipeline orchestrator to forward ANTHROPIC_API_KEY via body.apiKey (matches Conceive Step's pattern).

inputs.label: Playbook ID
inputs.helpText: UUID of a KV-backed playbook state entry. When provided, DesignStep reads prior-stage outputs (stages.splice.flowId / stages.harnessCode.template) from KV and writes stages.designUI back with its results.

inputs.label: Playbook KV collection
inputs.helpText: KV collection name for the playbook state entry. Defaults to 'playbooks'. Only used when playbookID is also provided.

inputs.label: Playbook KV key
inputs.helpText: KV key for the playbook state entry. Defaults to the playbookID when omitted. Only used when playbookID is also provided.
